ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* The year of the AFL season */,
  "season_code" TEXT /* A unique code for the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the season */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* The number of teams participating in the season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the AFL team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "ground" TEXT /* Name of the team's home ground */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* The year the team was founded */,
  "coach" TEXT /* The name of the current coach */,
  "captain" TEXT /* The name of the current captain */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season in which the game was played */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the opposing team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game was played */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the home team */,
  "score_opponent" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the opposing team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators attending the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff, grand final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Dominant hand of the player (e.g., right, left) */,
  "career_start_year" INTEGER /* The year the player started their AFL career */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, player, analyst) */,
  "team_affiliation" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the user is affiliated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_team_affiliation FOREIGN KEY ("team_affiliation") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game data accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the data */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the injured player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season in which the injury occurred */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury sustained */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Expected recovery date from the injury */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the injury */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  "recovery_status" TEXT /* Current recovery status of the player (e.g., in progress, recovered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player receiving the award */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season in which the award was received */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award received */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date when the award was received */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the award */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., individual, team) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
